title: FirePilot Operator Configuration
description: Validates firepilot.yaml — the centralised operator configuration file (ADR-0012). Includes SCM defaults, rule defaults, and zone topology mapping (ADR-0008).

scm.description: Strata Cloud Manager connection and placement defaults.

default_folder.description: Default SCM folder for rule placement. Maximum 64 characters.

default_position.description: Default rulebase position. Must be 'pre' or 'post'.

rule_defaults.description: Default field values applied to all managed security rules.

tag.description: Tag applied to every rule created by FirePilot.

log_end.description: Whether to log at session end by default.

log_start.description: Whether to log at session start by default.

zones.description: Map of SCM zone name to zone metadata. At least one zone must be defined. Replaces firewall-configs/zones.yaml (ADR-0008, ADR-0012).

role.description: Architectural role from the controlled vocabulary (ADR-0008).

description.description: Human-readable description of the zone's function.
